# OpenZWave Third-Party Notice

## Upstream source

- Project: OpenZWave
- Upstream repository: https://github.com/OpenZWave/open-zwave.git
- Local source path: third_party/openzwave
- Pinned version file: third_party/openzwave/PINNED_VERSION.txt

## License

OpenZWave license files are provided in the vendored source tree.
Refer to the upstream license text shipped under `third_party/openzwave`.

## Integration rule

OpenZWave is vendored locally, compiled with the client build, and shipped with YAHA artifacts.
Runtime must not depend on a separately installed system OpenZWave package.
